description:
The "serialize → write to {path}.{uuid}.tmp → rename" atomic write pattern is independently implemented 10+ times:

In orchestrator-core:
- services.rs:606-643 (FileServiceHub::write_json_atomic — most complete)
- daemon_config.rs:106-131, agent_runtime_config.rs:1072-1093
- state_machines/mod.rs:212-237, workflow_config.rs:355-376

In daemon modules:
- daemon_task_dispatch.rs:115-123, daemon_git_integration.rs:95-104
- daemon_phase_pool.rs:597-607, daemon_git_runtime_refresh.rs:105-108
- daemon_notifications.rs:1137-1145

In ops handlers:
- ops_common.rs:27-67 (write_json_pretty) — duplicated again in ops_requirements/state.rs:76-125

Solution: Export write_json_atomic from orchestrator-core as a pub utility. Delete all inline copies. The ops_common.rs and ops_requirements/state.rs copies of project_state_dir, read_json_or_default, write_json_pretty should also be consolidated.
title: Consolidate atomic write pattern (10+ copies across crates)
